> A seduction coach offering personal coaching services, likely focused on helping clients improve their confidence, social skills, and romantic success. The brand likely carries a bold, charismatic, and empowering personality aimed at transforming clients' dating and interpersonal lives.

---

## How to Contact Us

- Address: זבוטינסקי 4, רמת גן

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About קוד הפיתוי
A seduction coach offering personal coaching services, likely focused on helping clients improve their confidence, social skills, and romantic success. The brand likely carries a bold, charismatic, and empowering personality aimed at transforming clients' dating and interpersonal lives.

## Target Audience
- רווקים צעירים
- מקצוענים לשיפור כישורים חברתיים
- גברים גרושים טריים

## Industry
Seduction Coaching
